concepts.name: Dilaton Field
concepts.description: A scalar field in string theory that couples to the string tension and appears in the effective low-energy action

concepts.name: Moduli Fields
concepts.description: Scalar fields parameterizing the shape and size of compactified extra dimensions

concepts.name: Brane Inflation
concepts.description: Inflationary model where the inflaton is the separation of branes in extra dimensions

concepts.name: Compactification
concepts.description: Procedure of reducing extra dimensions to small sizes to match observed 4D spacetime

concepts.name: KKLT Scenario
concepts.description: Kachru-Kallosh-Linde-Trivedi model for de Sitter vacuum via anti-D3 branes

equations.name: String Frame Einstein Equations
equations.description: Einstein equations in string frame with NS-NS 3-form flux

equations.name: Dilaton Equation of Motion
equations.description: Scalar field evolution in curved spacetime

algorithms.name: Moduli Stabilization Solver
algorithms.description: Numerical solver for moduli potential minimization

algorithms.name: Inflationary Trajectory Integrator
algorithms.description: RK4 integrator for inflaton evolution with Hubble friction

references: Giddings, S. B. (1994). Lectures on 2D gravity and 2D quantum field theory
Kachru, S., Kallosh, A., Linde, A., & Trivedi, N. (2003). De Sitter vacua in string theory
Douglas, M. R. (2003). The statistics of string/M theory vacua
